title: Workload Health

panels.title: Desired vs Available Replicas
panels.description: Desired and available deployment replicas for the selected workload.

panels.title: Readiness Ratio
panels.description: Available replicas divided by desired replicas for the selected workload.

panels.title: Unavailable Replicas
panels.description: Unavailable replicas for the selected workload.

panels.title: CrashLoopBackOff
panels.description: Containers currently waiting because of CrashLoopBackOff.

panels.title: Restart Rate by Pod
panels.description: Recent restart rate grouped by pod.

panels.title: Last OOMKilled
panels.description: Containers whose last termination reason was OOMKilled.

panels.title: CPU Usage / Request
panels.description: CPU usage divided by requested CPU, grouped by pod.

panels.title: Memory Usage / Request and Limit
panels.description: Memory working set divided by request and limit, grouped by pod.

panels.title: Pods Failing Readiness
panels.description: Pods reporting Ready=false in the selected scope.

panels.title: Rollout Age
panels.description: Age of matching deployments in seconds.

description: Golden Path workload health detail for selected namespace, workload, pod, and container.
